## Description

<!-- Concise description of the change and its purpose. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (API or data schema)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Legislative-parameter update (new or revised YAML)

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make type` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes with coverage >= 90%
- [ ] `make reuse` passes
- [ ] No personal data committed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for user-visible changes)
- [ ] DCO sign-off on all commits (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] Commits signed (`git commit -S`)
- [ ] Conventional Commits format used
- [ ] If legislative-parameter change: SFS reference included in YAML header
